blurb_en:
Adobe signed a definitive agreement on June 25 to acquire Topaz Labs -- the AI image and video enhancement company whose upscaling, noise reduction, and restoration tools are standard equipment in professional photography and film post-production.
• Topaz Labs won a Technology and Engineering Emmy (76th Annual) for AI image and video enhancement -- meaning major studios have been quietly trusting its models on broadcast television output.
• Core models: Astra handles AI video upscaling including SDR-to-HDR conversion; Wonder handles image retouching and restoration. Neurostream is their proprietary on-device inference tech -- these models run locally, no cloud required.
• Adobe plans to integrate into Firefly and Creative Cloud apps including Photoshop, Lightroom, and Premiere Pro. Transaction closes H2 2026.
• Topaz CEO Eric Yang stays on; standalone Topaz products remain at topazlabs.com.
• That last clause is the one photographers are rereading.
• For camera and video professionals: Topaz tools handle exactly what action and wide-angle cameras produce -- high noise, compressed dynamic range, extreme motion. Bringing this pipeline inside Creative Cloud collapses a three-app post-production round trip.
blurb_zh:
Adobe于6月25日签署协议，收购Topaz Labs——这家以AI图像和视频增强工具著称的公司，其超分辨率、降噪及修复技术已成为专业摄影和影视后期的标配工具。
• Topaz Labs荣获第76届技术与工程艾美奖AI图像/视频增强奖项——这说明各大制作公司早已在广播级输出中默默使用其模型。
• 核心模型：Astra负责AI视频超分辨率（含SDR转HDR），Wonder负责图像修复；Neurostream是其专有的本地推理技术——模型在设备端运行，无需上传云端。
• Adobe计划将Topaz的AI整合进Firefly及Creative Cloud套件，包括Photoshop、Lightroom和Premiere Pro，预计2026年下半年完成交割。
• Topaz CEO Eric Yang将继续带领团队；Topaz独立产品仍可通过topazlabs.com单独购买。
• 「独立产品保留」是摄影圈正在反复斟酌的那句话。
• 对于相机和视频专业用户：Topaz处理的恰好是运动和广角相机最常产出的素材类型——高噪声、压缩动态范围、极端运动。如果这些能力进入Creative Cloud，后期制作的工具链将大幅缩短。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch, Variety, PetaPixel, Newsshooter, BusinessWire, and Adobe official press release at news.adobe.com. Emmy win confirmed via 76th Annual Technology and Engineering Emmy Awards across multiple outlets. CEO continuation and standalone products confirmed in official Adobe release.

blurb_en:
DeepSeek announced June 25 it will at least double the size of every department, days after finalizing one of China largest-ever startup fundraises -- roughly $7.4 billion led by Tencent and battery manufacturer CATL.
• The investor group includes China state-backed National AI Industry Investment Fund. Beijing is now institutionally backing the company it regards as its open-source national champion.
• Founder and CEO Liang Wenfeng reportedly contributed approximately $3 billion of his own money to the raise.
• The hiring announcement came via a WeChat post, not a press release -- which tells you who DeepSeek considers its primary audience.
• Roles targeted: data engineers, development engineers, and AI cross-disciplinary technical talent.
• DeepSeek became famous for producing frontier-class AI at a fraction of US competitor costs. Whether doubling the headcount doubles the output or just the overhead is the interesting question.
blurb_zh:
DeepSeek于6月25日宣布，将至少扩充所有部门规模至原来的两倍，此前该公司刚完成中国史上最大规模AI创业融资之一——约74亿美元，由腾讯和宁德时代领投。
• 投资方包括中国国家人工智能产业投资基金，北京已将DeepSeek视为国内开源AI旗手并进行国家级背书。
• 创始人兼CEO梁文锋据报道个人出资约30亿美元参与本轮融资。
• 招聘公告通过微信发出，而非新闻稿——这说明DeepSeek清楚自己的核心受众是谁。
• 招募岗位包括数据工程师、开发工程师，以及该公司所称的AI跨学科技术人才。
• DeepSeek以极低成本训练出前沿级AI模型而声名大噪。团队翻倍之后，产出是否也能翻倍，还是只有开销翻倍——这才是值得追问的问题。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Bloomberg (June 25). Cross-referenced with Morningstar/Dow Jones, SiliconRepublic, The Edge Malaysia, and Cryptobriefing. .4B fundraise confirmed by earlier Bloomberg (June 3) reporting with SiliconANGLE corroborating. Founder B personal contribution from Bloomberg. WeChat announcement confirmed across multiple outlets.

blurb_en:
Google has quietly pushed Gemini 3.5 Pro launch from June to July, according to Business Insider -- one month after CEO Sundar Pichai told I/O developers the model would arrive next month.
• Reason given: refining early tester feedback, particularly coding performance, token efficiency, and long-task accuracy. Google declined to comment officially.
• Gemini 3.5 Flash, the faster-cheaper variant, is already shipping. It is the Pro tier -- the one competing directly with Anthropic flagship models -- that is waiting.
• The delay arrives alongside a rough stretch for Google AI: four senior researchers left for Anthropic and OpenAI in six days this month, including Nobel Prize winner John Jumper and two core Gemini team members.
• Sundar Pichai made the June commitment publicly and specifically. A quiet slip to July is the kind of quiet that gets noticed.
blurb_zh:
据Business Insider报道，Google已将Gemini 3.5 Pro的发布时间从六月悄然推迟至七月——就在一个月前，CEO桑达尔·皮查伊在I/O大会上明确承诺该模型将下个月发布。
• 官方理由：吸纳早期测试用户反馈，重点优化编程能力、Token效率和长任务准确性。Google官方拒绝置评。
• Gemini 3.5 Flash（更快、更便宜的版本）已正式上线。开发者真正等待的是Pro版本——它才是与Anthropic旗舰模型直接竞争的产品。
• 推迟背景：本月Google AI接连遭遇人才流失，包括诺贝尔奖得主John Jumper在内的四位高级研究员在六天内先后加入Anthropic和OpenAI。
• 皮查伊的六月承诺是公开且具体的。如今悄悄推迟到七月，这种悄然本身就引人注目。
verification_notes: Originally reported by Business Insider; could not fetch original (paywall). Confirmed via Investing.com, Cryptobriefing, AnalyticsInsight, DigitalToday.co.kr -- all independently citing the BI report. I/O Pichai quote confirmed via Google I/O May 2026 coverage. Google declined to comment officially per multiple reports.
